title: aeschynanthus oxychlamys
intro: Aeschynanthus oxychlamys, also known as the mischievous lip or Lipstick plant, is a species of flowering plant in the Gesneriaceae family. Traditionally, Aeschynanthus oxychlamys has been used in herbal medicine due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. This plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing digestive issues. Aeschynanthus oxychlamys is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, allowing its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of herbal remedies.
